rows.label: tlk47300164_03_msg0001
rows.name:
I'm glad nothing happened
to the children who went to Acedia!

rows.label: tlk47300164_03_msg0002
rows.name:
The world's in quite a mess.
Could something happen
to Iyasaki Village too?

rows.label: tlk47300164_03_msg0003
rows.name:
We must stay even more alert,
so the villagers won't be afraid.
